title: Implement a debounce utility
prompt: Create `debounce.mjs` exporting `debounce(fn, waitMs)`. It returns a function that delays invoking `fn` until `waitMs` have elapsed since the last call. Only the final call within a burst should fire, and `fn` should receive the arguments of that final call.

grade.command: node -e "import('./debounce.mjs').then(async m=>{let calls=[];const d=m.debounce((x)=>calls.push(x),30);d(1);d(2);d(3);await new Promise(r=>setTimeout(r,60));if(JSON.stringify(calls)!=='[3]')throw new Error('got '+JSON.stringify(calls));console.log('ok')})"
